summary: Frontend testing completed for SkopeOS Kitchen Management Platform - DemoDashboard bypass solution. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All dashboard data is MOCKED/HARDCODED in DemoDashboard.jsx - no actual API calls
Contact Us page has API calls to /api/meeting/slots and /api/meeting/authorize-booking which may fail without backend
test_credentials: None required - Demo mode with static data
seed_data_creation: None - All data is hardcoded in DemoDashboard.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: DemoDashboard is a bypass solution for 502 login errors. All data is static/hardcoded. Admin/Client toggle works correctly. Navigation from Home page to /demo-dashboard works via all CTAs.

details: Hero CTA 'View Demo Dashboard' navigates correctly
Bottom CTA section buttons work correctly
Admin view shows correct stats: Total Revenue (₹2,45,680), Active Orders (24), Low Stock Items (12), B2B Clients (10)
Client view shows correct stats: My Orders (8), Total Spent (₹45,600), Pending Orders (2), Credit Available (₹2,00,000)
Role toggle button switches between Admin and Client views
Recent Orders section displays correctly for Admin view
My Orders section displays correctly for Client view
Alerts section displays correctly for Admin view
Notifications section displays correctly for Client view
Quick Actions grid shows appropriate actions for each role
View All Alerts/Notifications button present and functional
Dashboard, Analytics, Inventory, Recipes, Orders, Clients, Food Cost, Projections nav items present
Menu toggle button hides/shows sidebar correctly
Settings and Logout buttons present in sidebar

mocked_data_note: ALL DASHBOARD DATA IS MOCKED - Stats, orders, alerts are hardcoded in DemoDashboard.jsx
